description: Project builds clean: npm run build exits 0 with no TypeScript errors
steps: run npm run build
confirm exit code 0
confirm no TS errors in output

description: Dev server boots and renders the boot screen
steps: run npm run dev
open localhost
see AI TRAINER boot screen

description: Tron theme tokens defined in index.css @theme and used (no hardcoded hex in components)
steps: open src/index.css
confirm @theme has cyan/orange/violet/lime/rose tokens
grep components for raw hex

description: Glowing Tron grid floor renders behind content
steps: load app
observe fixed grid background with radial mask

description: Rubric engine detects role signal in a prompt
steps: call rubric on 'You are a chef. Write a recipe.'
confirm role signal detected true

description: Rubric engine detects all core signals across a strong prompt
steps: build a prompt containing role, context, audience, format, constraints, example, tone
run rubric
confirm each signal flagged present
confirm score is high (>80)
confirm a weak prompt scores low (<35)
confirm score is deterministic across repeated calls
confirm per-signal feedback strings returned
confirm no network call made
confirm function is pure (no localStorage writes)
confirm empty prompt returns score 0 without throwing
confirm very long prompt handled without error

description: Rubric returns per-signal feedback with actionable next step
steps: run rubric on weak prompt
confirm feedback names the single highest-impact missing signal

description: Taste Engine records an interest event and updates weighted profile
steps: call taste.record with topic cooking
call taste.record with topic cooking again
confirm cooking weight increased
confirm topInterests returns cooking first
confirm profile persists to localStorage
confirm reload restores profile
confirm unknown tag is rejected or namespaced safely
confirm topInterests(n) respects n
confirm a fresh profile returns sensible defaults
confirm no questions/prompts surfaced to user by the engine

description: Progress engine awards XP, levels up, and tracks streak
steps: add XP below threshold, confirm level unchanged
add XP past threshold, confirm level increments
confirm streak increments on consecutive plays
confirm badges can be unlocked and de-duplicated
confirm state persists to localStorage
confirm reload restores XP/level/streak/badges
confirm HUD-facing selector returns a stable shape
confirm resetting progress clears storage

description: Level/content data schema is typed and shared
steps: open src/engine/types.ts
confirm Level, Signal, IdeaCard, DeckCard types exported
confirm screens can import them

description: App shell mounts router with Hub as the landing route
steps: load app
confirm Hub renders
confirm routes exist for each mode

description: HUD shows live XP, level, and streak and updates after an action
steps: observe HUD on load
complete a scoring action
confirm XP number rises in the HUD without reload

description: Hub is a Tron map with selectable mode nodes
steps: load Hub
confirm each mode appears as a node
click a node, confirm navigation to that mode

description: Glow-Up mode is fully playable end to end
steps: open Glow-Up
see lazy starter prompt and weak output
add a Role ingredient
confirm prompt text and score update
add Context, Constraints, Format ingredients
confirm simulated output visibly improves
confirm score crosses the win threshold
confirm a win state / XP award fires
confirm you can remove an ingredient and score drops
confirm reduced-motion users still get a usable experience
confirm keyboard can add/remove ingredients

description: HUD and Hub use neon-box/panel utilities and glow, no raw hex
steps: inspect HUD and Hub markup
confirm .panel/.neon-box/.text-glow used
grep for hardcoded hex

description: Mind Reader mode is playable end to end
steps: open Mind Reader
see a secret goal
write a vague prompt and submit
confirm the literal AI reply exposes the gap to the goal
confirm a hint/diff highlights what was unspecified
revise the prompt to add the missing specifics
submit again
confirm the reply now satisfies the goal
confirm a win/XP award fires
confirm at least 3 distinct goals exist
confirm it never calls the network

description: Did-You-Know Deck flips cards and runs micro-challenges
steps: open Deck mode
see a stack/grid of cards
flip a card to reveal the unexpected use
start its 30s micro-challenge
submit an attempt and get rubric feedback
confirm engaging a card records a Taste event
confirm progress through the deck is tracked
confirm at least 8 cards exist across varied topics
confirm cards are keyboard-flippable
confirm a completed card is visibly marked

description: Badges/progression screen reflects real progress state
steps: earn XP and a badge in another mode
open Badges screen
confirm earned badges show unlocked and locked ones show how to earn them
confirm XP/level/streak shown match the engine
confirm Idea Forge entry or teaser is reachable

description: Idea Forge generates personalized ideas from the Taste profile
steps: play cards/prompts skewed toward cooking and writing
open Idea Forge
confirm generated ideas reference the inferred interests
play skewed toward coding instead
confirm Idea Forge output changes accordingly
confirm ideas come from the offline idea bank
confirm no quiz questions were asked
confirm a fresh user with no signal still gets reasonable starter ideas
confirm each idea is actionable (a thing to try with AI)
confirm it never calls the network

description: Content pack: at least 15 levels/items across the modes
steps: count Glow-Up levels
count Mind Reader goals
count Deck cards
confirm total >= 15 and spread across modes

description: Win/feedback juice: animated score, glow burst, and copy feel game-y
steps: trigger a win
observe animated XP and a glow/particle burst
confirm copy is short and playful

description: Transitions between screens use Tron light-trail / snap motion
steps: navigate Hub to a mode
observe a trail/snap transition
confirm it is disabled under reduced-motion

description: Zero em dashes anywhere in shipped copy
steps: grep all src for the em dash character
confirm zero matches in user-facing strings

description: Fully keyboard navigable with visible focus and basic a11y
steps: tab through Hub and each mode
confirm focus is visible
confirm interactive elements are reachable and labeled
confirm reduced-motion honored

description: State persists across reload and survives offline
steps: earn XP, set taste profile
hard reload
confirm progress and profile intact
go offline
confirm app still loads and plays

description: Responsive: usable on a phone-width viewport
steps: resize to 390px wide
confirm Hub and modes are usable with no horizontal scroll
confirm tap targets are adequate
